I've seen many examples of people who have worked tirelessly to develop their skills and talents, and I believe that this hard work is what sets them apart. Therefore, I don't think that genius is solely the result of luck or innate ability, but rather a combination of both.

header_21.raw_response: Based on my personality and experiences, I tend to be someone who values planning and organization. I like to start projects early and work steadily towards a deadline, rather than leaving things until the last minute. I've learned that this approach helps me stay calm and focused, and I'm more likely to produce high-quality work. However, I do appreciate the idea of a last-minute burst of energy and motivation, and I've had moments where I've pulled an all-nighter to meet a deadline. But overall, I think I'm more of an early completion type of person.
